chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1524 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA No.6105/2022 2. For hearing of main case 25-01-2024 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner, no intimation received. Learned AAG has filed parawise comments of respondent No.3. This petition has served its purpose as according to learned AAG the petitioner has been retired and has received all the retirement benefits. Be that as it may, since no one is present on behalf of the petitioner, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
